_doc: Registry of expert-prose source channels. The ETL (src/ingest/) is channel-agnostic and keys off this file. slug = the bucket name used in BOTH data/subs/<slug>/ (raw, gitignored) and draft-guides/<slug>/ (results, committed). fetch with: src/ingest/fetch_subs.sh <slug>.

lords-of-limited.name: Lords of Limited
lords-of-limited.notes: Channel #1 (original). Per-set consolidated guide; ## Card notes bullets are parsed into the draft JSON.

numot.name: NumotTheNummy (Kenji Egashira)
numot.notes: Channel #2. Gameplay-driven; auto-captions of speech (names mangled, mark (?)).

limited-resources.name: Limited Resources (Marshall Sutcliffe + Luis Scott-Vargas)
limited-resources.content_type: audio podcast on YouTube: card-by-card set reviews (letter grades) + format overviews
limited-resources.notes: Channel #3 (added 2026-06). Review/theory lens, decorrelated from the two gameplay channels; preserves LR's per-card letter grades. Audio auto-captions (names mangled, mark (?)).
